rallyCry.name: Rally Cry
rallyCry.text: Raise imperial morale and mend wounded legions resting beside havens.
rallyCry.preview: +2 morale. Heal 1 HP to every Olundaran unit beside a city, outpost, or shrine.

sunBeacon.name: Sun Beacon
sunBeacon.text: Kindle a pillar of light above Olundar Prime to sweep the frontier fog.
sunBeacon.preview: Reveal a wide radius around your capital for the rest of this turn.

blightWard.name: Blight Ward
blightWard.text: Anoint the legions with sun-oil so grave-blight cannot bite this turn.
blightWard.preview: Living units ignore grave-blight attrition until you end the turn.

forcedMarch.name: Forced March
forcedMarch.text: Sound the bronze horns and drive every ready cohort one league farther.
forcedMarch.preview: All Olundaran units gain +1 movement for the rest of this turn.
